title: Discuss
expectation: Discuss ideas, tradeoffs, and recommendations for the user's request without making repository changes in this process. The shared checkout, worktrees, and worker instances are all read-only discussion surfaces unless the user explicitly switches to a code-changing process. When the request may depend on repository guidance or architecture rules, search for relevant `blueprints` folders in the workspace and in the project repos before concluding what applies.
idlePrompt: If the discussion is complete, reply only with 'done: discussion complete'. If you are truly blocked on a needed user decision, reply only with 'blocked: discussion needs user input'. Otherwise resume the discussion immediately and add substantive analysis instead of giving only a status update.
